verdict: High AI displacement risk due to increasing automation in animation tasks, but creative judgment and human touch remain essential.

reasoning_steps.title: Increasing automation in animation tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks such as designing graphics, creating animations, and implementing configuration control systems can be automated using computer software and programming languages.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative judgment and human touch remain essential
reasoning_steps.body: While AI can generate basic designs and illustrations, human animators are still needed to bring creativity, originality, and emotional depth to animation projects.

evidence_ledger.contribution: Provides a comprehensive list of tasks required for animators
Highlights the importance of creativity and human touch in animation

adjacent_careers.name: Visual Effects Artist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both animators and visual effects artists work on creating motion graphics, but visual effects artists focus more on post-production and high-end visual effects

adjacent_careers.name: Graphic Designer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: While graphic designers can create basic designs, animators require specialized skills in animation and storytelling

recent_developments.headline: Generative tools enter mainstream creative pipelines
recent_developments.impact: Studios and agencies use AI for ideation, layout, voice, and music drafts — finals still human-finished.

recent_developments.headline: Stock-image and stock-music markets compress
recent_developments.impact: AI-generated assets are taking share from libraries that once monetized routine creative output.

recent_developments.headline: Provenance standards (C2PA) gain industry backing
recent_developments.impact: Major platforms and cameras commit to content credentials so human-made work can be marked as such.

quotes.quote: I am utterly disgusted. This is an insult to life itself.
quotes.speaker: Hayao Miyazaki
quotes.title: Co-founder, Studio Ghibli

quotes.quote: AI is a tool. It will not replace artists. It will replace artists who do not learn to use AI as a tool.
quotes.speaker: Refik Anadol
quotes.title: Media artist

quotes.quote: Generative tools collapse the cost of producing a draft to near zero. The differentiator becomes taste, judgment, and knowing what is worth making at all.
quotes.speaker: John Maeda
quotes.title: Designer; VP of Design and AI, Microsoft
